decisions.title: Make .agents canonical governance source
decisions.summary: All governance authoring occurs under .agents; AGENTS.md and .github/copilot-instructions.md are synchronized mirrors.

decisions.title: Contract-first policy enforcement
decisions.summary: Normative rules move to contract YAML with rule IDs; instructions only interpret.

decisions.title: Favor canonical exports and remove dead aliases quickly
decisions.summary: Duplicate export names are consolidated to a single canonical surface, and orphan transaction/select/helper modules are removed once reachability is confirmed.

open_questions.question: Should CI enforce AGENTS and .github/copilot-instructions byte equality?
